How we work

A partner model designed for execution.

We work closely with MGAs, brokers and platforms to create scalable solutions without slowing innovation down.

01 — Understand

Understand the opportunity

We start with your market, customers and goals. No generic solutions.

02 — Structure

Structure the solution

We design product, pricing and operational setup adapted to your distribution model.

03 — Launch

Launch efficiently

Go live fast. From compliance sign-off to first policy issued in days.

04 — Scale

Scale together

Long-term partnerships built on performance, transparency and ongoing product development.

About Eir

Built around long-term partnerships.

Eir is a fully licensed Swedish insurance company built on the belief that insurance works better when carrier and partner are genuinely aligned.

We bring Nordic pragmatism to a complex industry: direct communication, fast decisions, and genuine commitment to making partnerships work.

Partner-first approach
Direct, honest communication
Licensed and regulated in Sweden
Live in 10+ markets across Europe

About Eir

"Named after Eir — the Norse goddess of healing and protection."

Norse mythology · Lyvjaberg · The healing mountain

Built around long-term partnerships.

Eir is a fully licensed Swedish insurance company built on the belief that insurance works better when carrier and partner are genuinely aligned.

We bring Nordic pragmatism to a complex industry: direct communication, fast decisions, and a genuine commitment to making partnerships work over time.

—Partner-first approach
—Licensed by the Swedish FSA
—Live in 10+ markets across Europe
—Founded Stockholm · 2019
